name: Kozmoll Wickedwitch
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｋｏｚｍｏ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>コズモ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ダーク・ローズ
desc: During either player's turn: You can banish this card; Special Summon 1 Level 5 or higher "Kozmo" monster from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Kozmoll Wickedwitch" once per turn. Once per turn, during either player's turn: You can pay 1000 LP; this turn, this card cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects.
